phases.name: SKILL.md root-layout changes (Slice 01 + Slice 02)
phases.description: Extend all six engagement SKILL.md files. Slice 01: cb-init gains --root flag, conditional overwrite guard, {target} path variable, collision warning. Slice 02: all five downstream skills (cb-log, cb-retro, cb-snapshot, cb-validate, coach-buddy) gain Engagement Path Resolver — layout-transparent config detection. No new files. No executable code.

steps.name: cb-init: --root flag, conditional overwrite guard, {target} path variable
steps.description: Add --root flag to cb-init. Conditional overwrite guard: if --root active, check ./config.json; else check engagements/<slug>/config.json. All file paths use {target} variable (./  vs engagements/<slug>/). Collision warning when COACHING_LOG.md present at root but config.json absent. Success output shows {target}. Update argument-hint and What this does section.
steps.criteria: cb-init with --root creates all files at ./; without --root creates at engagements/<slug>/; overwrite guard uses correct path per mode; collision warning fires on COACHING_LOG.md present + config.json absent; success output shows ./; --root <path> unsupported — suggests cd workaround
steps.scenario_name: Coach completes a full root-layout engagement initialisation
quality_gates: All six files created at ./ in root layout
Collision warning: COACHING_LOG.md at root, no config.json
implementation_notes: SKILL.md-only change — prose architecture, no executable code
target variable: ./ when --root active, engagements/<slug>/ otherwise
File templates are unchanged — only path prefix changes

steps.name: Slice 02: Engagement Path Resolver in all five downstream skills
steps.description: Replace hardcoded engagements/<slug>/ reads with Engagement Path Resolver pattern (verbatim, per REF-D4) in cb-log, cb-retro, cb-snapshot, cb-validate. Add new ## Engagement context (optional) section to coach-buddy (after ## Core stance, before ## Mode management). All subsequent file paths use {engagement_path} variable. Legacy layout unchanged.
steps.criteria: Each downstream skill has Engagement Path Resolver Step 1/2/3 verbatim; ./config.json schema check (version + engagement.slug) gates root layout; slug disambiguation bypassed in root layout; all file paths use {engagement_path}; no engagement error message suggests /cb-init or /cb-init --root; coach-buddy proceeds silently with no engagement; legacy layout regression preserved
steps.scenario_name: Coach logs an observation in root layout without any slug prompt
quality_gates: Detection logic identical across all five downstream skills
Schema-specific: non-engagement config.json at root falls back to legacy
coach-buddy: silent no-op when no engagement found (no error)
implementation_notes: SKILL.md-only change — prose architecture, no executable code
Engagement Path Resolver embedded verbatim per ADR-008 self-containment invariant
coach-buddy has no existing Reading the engagement config section — new section added at insertion point specified in REF-D5

validation.note: SKILL.md-only feature — prose architecture. Roadmap reflects pre-existing implementation. All 6 SKILL.md files verified against DESIGN REF-D5 blueprint before roadmap creation.
